subcodes.first_line: The Most Exalted Pen hath, in the Prison of 'Akká, turned toward the loved ones in the land of Khá, namely, those souls who are adorned with the new raiment [3.5s]... ...The time foreordained unto the peoples and kindreds of the earth is now come. The promises of God, as recorded in the holy Scriptures, have all been fulfilled
subcodes.first_line_orig: قلم اعلی در سجن عکا باحبای ارض خا توجه نموده یعنی نفوسیکه بطراز جدید مزین
subcodes.subjects: @the Bab; the Primal Point; station and claims of the Bab, @prophecy and fulfillment, @Word of God and human limitations, @divine unity [tawhid] and degrees of unity, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @greatness and influence of the Cause; of this Day
